blocks.text: Shipping Boxes & Export Cartons Manufacturer in Vietnam – Jinhao Xinyuan Group
High-strength B/E/BC corrugated shipping cartons engineered for global transport and export reliability.
Durable Corrugated Shipping Boxes for Global Export
Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam produces heavy-duty corrugated shipping boxes and export cartons engineered for long-distance transport, warehouse handling, and cross-border logistics.
Our shipping boxes are manufactured using high-strength corrugated board (B, C, E, BE, BC) combined with strict ISTA testing, ensuring your products arrive safely anywhere in the world.
From standard RSC cartons to custom die-cut export packaging, we deliver reliable and sustainable cartons for industrial, retail, and e-commerce use.
Why Brands Choose XinYuan Vietnam for Export Cartons

Our factory integrates corrugation, printing, die-cutting, and testing in one streamlined workflow, ensuring consistent export-grade quality at scale.We manufacture both single-wall and double-wall cartons for demanding applications such as heavy industrial goods, electronics, food, consumer goods, and fragile products.
• Designed for stacking, compression, and long-distance shipping
Designed for stacking, compression, and long-distance shipping
• Reliable printing for handling & logistic marks
Reliable printing for handling & logistic marks
Types of Shipping Boxes We Manufacture

Jinhao Xinyuan Group manufactures a complete range of corrugated packaging boxes. With integrated printing, die-cutting, corrugation, and gluing, we ensure every structure meets the functional and branding requirements of your industry.
Most common export carton for industrial and consumer products.
Extra strength for heavy goods and long export routes.
Ideal for electronics, delicate items, heavy loads.
Custom structures optimized for product fit & protection.
For outer packing, bulk items & warehouse distribution.
Optimized for container loading and Euro-pallet sizing.
Our Vietnam facility is structured so clients can combine multiple corrugated formats in one shipment — improving logistics and MOQ flexibility.
We manufacture export cartons using in-house corrugation lines:
• B-Flute — strong, medium weight shipping cartons
B-Flute — strong, medium weight shipping cartons
• E-Flute — smaller protective boxes, inner packaging
E-Flute — smaller protective boxes, inner packaging
• BE Double Wall — improved shock absorption for e-commerce
BE Double Wall — improved shock absorption for e-commerce
• BC Double Wall — maximum protection for heavy loads
BC Double Wall — maximum protection for heavy loads
• Triple Wall (optional) — for industrial-grade export requirements
Triple Wall (optional) — for industrial-grade export requirements
All liners are FSC-certified and available in kraft and white top.

Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam delivers printing quality unmatched by standard corrugated manufacturers. By combining offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for transit cartons, we achieve both strength and branding impact.
• Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging
Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging
• UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch surfaces
UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch surfaces
• Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces
Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces
• Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
This makes our factory the ideal partner for brands that need retail-level print quality on corrugated packaging.
Clear, Durable Printing for Global Logistic Requirements
Our printing systems ensure that logistic information, barcodes, handling marks, and branding remain readable and durable from shipment to delivery.
We supply export customers who require consistent performance for e-commerce, retail distribution, and industrial shipping.
Every export carton undergoes strict performance verification in our ISTA lab:
This guarantees export-grade reliability, especially for cross-border shipments and containerized transport.
